overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit covered market walkway at night. The wet concrete reflects colorful neon signs as the player moves past food stalls, benches, and industrial barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with food stalls and seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered market corridor, observing the neon-lit stalls

entered.detail: transparent and metal roof structure covering the walkway, reflecting neon lights
vertical black metal beams supporting the roof structure
long concrete seating bench along the left wall
bright green neon sign reading 'OPEN' above a food stall
wet concrete ground reflecting the colorful neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market walkway at night. Neon signs cast colorful reflections on the wet concrete floor. Metal support beams line the left side alongside concrete benches, while a food stall with a glowing green 'OPEN' sign occupies the right. The camera moves steadily forward through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning from commercial to industrial storage area

events.description: pedestrian in red jacket passes closely by on the left, temporarily occupying the foreground
rusty industrial barrels and storage containers become visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market walkway as a pedestrian passes by and the environment shifts to industrial elements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and white skirt walking past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: large rusty industrial barrels stacked on the left side of the walkway
wooden counter and structure of a market vendor stall
trash and scattered paper magazines littering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, a pedestrian in a distinctive red jacket passes closely by. The commercial food stall with the neon sign falls behind, replaced by industrial storage elements. Rusty metal barrels appear on the left, and the floor becomes littered with scattered trash and magazines. The walkway maintains its covered structure but transitions from retail to storage functionality.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial market back area with storage containers and barriers

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial barriers and barrels toward the end of the corridor

entered.detail: large blue metal industrial barriers and containers blocking off the left side
red painted metal railings along an elevated platform or walkway
dry dead weeds and vegetation growing around the industrial barriers

segments.scene_description: The final section features prominent industrial elements with large blue barriers and rusty barrels dominating the left side. Red railings line an elevated section of the walkway, while dead vegetation grows around the base of the containers. The camera continues forward through this utilitarian back-area of the market, approaching a more open intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a covered cyberpunk market that transitions from a vibrant commercial walkway into a gritty industrial storage area. It begins in a sheltered corridor where neon signs cast colorful reflections on wet concrete, passing a food stall with a glowing green open sign and concrete benches. As the camera progresses, a pedestrian in a red jacket passes by and the retail atmosphere fades, replaced by rusty metal barrels and scattered trash littering the floor. The scene then shifts further into a utilitarian back-area dominated by large blue barriers and red railings, with dead vegetation clinging to the base of industrial containers. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance through this weathered environment toward a more open intersection ahead.
